narration: What happens to your body at high altitudes? It’s not what you think.
visual_description: Hook visual: What happens to your body at high altitudes? It’s not what you think.

narration: Acclimatization altitude is where your body struggles to adapt to lower oxygen levels.
visual_description: Context visual: Acclimatization altitude is where your body struggles to adapt to lower oxygen levels.

narration: At 8,000 feet, many feel dizzy and fatigued. But why? Let’s break it down.
visual_description: Escalation visual: At 8,000 feet, many feel dizzy and fatigued. But why? Let’s break it down.

narration: Your body increases red blood cells, but this takes time. Some adapt, some don’t.

narration: Inconsistent outcomes create uncertainty. It’s a complex process influenced by genetics and duration.
